history.what_changed: added initial gitmind engine with diff reader functionality
history.why_it_likely_changed: to enable version control analysis and change tracking within a project
history.impact: significant for developers looking to enhance their ability to review code changes through AI-driven tools

history.what_changed: Added a new function to check if the current commit is the first one and updated the diff reading logic accordingly.
history.why_it_likely_changed: To handle the initial commit's diff correctly, as it differs from regular commits in git history.
history.impact: Improves handling of the first commit's diff in the application.

history.what_changed: Refactored JSON parsing logic in llm.py to extract, coerce field types, and sanitize feature names
history.why_it_likely_changed: To improve robustness and reliability of JSON data processing
history.impact: Enhances the accuracy and safety of data handling in the code analysis tool

history.what_changed: added 'format': 'json' to the JSON payload sent to the model
history.why_it_likely_changed: to enforce valid JSON output from the model
history.impact: ensures the model's output is in a consistent, parseable JSON format

history.what_changed: sanitized and truncated feature_name to 40 characters
history.why_it_likely_changed: to ensure feature_name compliance with system requirements
history.impact: modifies feature_name handling in core/llm.py

history.what_changed: Added issue templates and CI/CD workflows
history.why_it_likely_changed: To improve repository setup with better documentation and automation
history.impact: Enhanced repository organization, improved collaboration, and streamlined development processes

history.what_changed: Added write permission for contents and configured git for docs deploy bot in the GitHub Actions workflow
history.why_it_likely_changed: To ensure the bot has the necessary permissions to write to the repository's content and correctly identify itself when committing changes
history.impact: Improves the automation of deploying documentation by ensuring proper access and identity

history.what_changed: Added a new document detailing the build log of gitmind including commit history and issues encountered.
history.why_it_likely_changed: To provide transparency and context about the development process and issues faced during the build of gitmind.
history.impact: Enhances the documentation and helps in understanding the build history and potential issues of gitmind.

history.what_changed: Added graceful error handling for Ollama timeout and connection errors
history.why_it_likely_changed: To improve robustness and user experience by catching specific exceptions related to the Ollama service
history.impact: Enhances the stability of the system when interacting with the Ollama service, making it more resilient to common issues like timeouts and connection errors

history.what_changed: Removed .gitmind tracking and updated feature names
history.why_it_likely_changed: To clean up unnecessary files and standardize naming conventions
history.impact: Simplified repository management by removing redundant directories

history.what_changed: Added script to generate build log from metadata.json and modified docs.yml workflow
history.why_it_likely_changed: To automate the generation of build logs for documentation purposes, improving efficiency and consistency
history.impact: Will reduce manual work in generating build logs and ensure they are consistent across builds

history.what_changed: formatted code with black
history.why_it_likely_changed: to improve code readability and consistency
history.impact: minor formatting changes, no functional impact

history.what_changed: updated the directories checked by the Black CI check
history.why_it_likely_changed: to ensure code style consistency across more directories
history.impact: may improve code quality and maintainability by covering more source files in the style check

history.what_changed: Amended git commits to include metadata.json and formatted tests with Black.
history.why_it_likely_changed: To ensure all relevant files are included in commits and maintain code consistency.
history.impact: May affect commit history and require additional verification steps during merges.

history.what_changed: Added a guard against an infinite amend loop in the post-commit hook using the GITMIND_RUNNING environment variable.
history.why_it_likely_changed: To prevent the commit hook from firing again during the amend process, causing an infinite loop.
history.impact: Ensures that commits are updated safely without triggering the post-commit hook in a loop.

history.what_changed: Pin Black to --target-version py39 in the CI workflow
history.why_it_likely_changed: To ensure consistent code style checks across local development and CI environments, matching Python 2 or older versions handling imports correctly.
history.impact: Ensures consistent code style checking across local and CI environments, potentially affecting developers working with Python 2 or older versions who may have issues with import handling.

history.what_changed: Pinned black version to 25.1.0 in CI and added pyproject.toml for consistent formatting
history.why_it_likely_changed: To ensure consistent code style across the project and make CI more robust against different versions of black
history.impact: This change ensures that all developers use the same version of black, which can help avoid formatting-related issues during code reviews and deployments.

history.what_changed: Cleaned metadata.json and improved build log intro, added demo recording script
history.why_it_likely_changed: To maintain project documentation and improve user experience by adding practical steps for generating a demo.
history.impact: Enhances user engagement and documentation clarity

history.what_changed: Added a demo GIF to README.md and cleaned up build log documentation
history.why_it_likely_changed: To enhance the visibility and usability of the project by providing visual demonstrations
history.impact: Improves user understanding and engagement with the project through visual content

history.what_changed: Reindexed all commits through LLM, generating real diffs and metadata
history.why_it_likely_changed: To improve the accuracy and usefulness of commit summaries and metadata
history.impact: Enhances the reliability and comprehensiveness of commit logs and metadata across the project

history.what_changed: Switched to Qwen2.5-coder model and reindexed all commits
history.why_it_likely_changed: To improve code analysis accuracy with a more advanced model
history.impact: Enhances the quality of code analysis and understanding of commit history

history.what_changed: updated references from deepseek-coder to qwen2.5-coder:7b
history.why_it_likely_changed: to update the documentation and codebase to reflect the new version of the language model being used
history.impact: potentially impacts how commits are analyzed by changing the model used for analysis

history.what_changed: Added a filter to remove noise files from changed files list and reindexed all commits
history.why_it_likely_changed: To clean up the build log and improve LLM performance by reducing irrelevant file changes
history.impact: Reduced build log noise and potentially improved LLM processing speed
